poi.info:
[- USE BANK -]
• Deposit At Least One Item Into The Bank • Salvage Everything You Can • Have All Your [Essence Of Luck] In Your Invintory

[- LEARN ARTIFICING -]
• Talk To Skya [Master Artificer] And Learn To Be An Artificer!
[- CRAFTING (1-10) -]
• Use The Station To Upgrade All Your [Essence Of Luck] As High As You Can As Well As Refine All The Resources You Can To Hit Crafting Level 10+
• If After That You Are Still Under Crafting Level 10, Craft Anything With What You Have Found So Far To Hit Crafting Level 10
[- NOTE -] If You Level/Have Leveled Handiworker Crafting It Is Account Wide And You Dont Need To Worry About Leveling Crafting At All In This Guide. Just Pickup Artificing And Do The Other Crafting Steps And Move On.

[- ARE YOU LEVEL 30+? -]
• I Am Level 30+! If you have reached level 30 you can continue onto Volume 3 of this speed leveling guide and go left!
• I Am NOT Level 30+! If you are not level 30 yet, please go right and continue leveling by doing some story!

[- CRAFTING (10-30) -]
• Upgrade All Your [Essence Of Luck] As High As You Can Again • Craft At Least 1 Masterwork [Essence Of Luck] • If Crafting Level Is Under 30 Then Craft/Refine What You Can To Get To 30 Crafting Level
[- NOTE -] If You Level/Have Leveled Handiworker Crafting It Is Account Wide And You Dont Need To Worry About Leveling Crafting You Just Need To Craft A Masterwork Item.

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -]
Welcome To The Half-way Point In The Run. Depending On What Boosters/Buffs You Have You May Be Just A Bit Overleveled Or WAY Overleveled But Either Way You Probably Feel A Bit Squishy. So Take This Time To Fix That.
*** DO NOT SKIP DOING UPGRADES! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Quality Sharpening Stone
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This Process Will Always Be The Same • Click The Cog Icon • Make The Level Range -5/+1 Current Level • Click The First Dropdown And Select Power • Click The Fifth Dropdown And Select Fine • Sort By Price And Buy +What Is Cheapest +What Is Closest In Level • Click Through Each Category And Repeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Major Rune of Vampirism • (2) Major Rune of the Warrior • (2) Major Sigil of Blood • (2) Major Sigil of Fire

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -]
Welcome To The Half-way Point In The Run. Depending On What Boosters/Buffs You Have You May Be Just A Bit Overleveled Or WAY Overleveled But Either Way You Probably Feel A Bit Squishy. So Take This Time To Fix That.
*** DO NOT SKIP DOING UPGRADES! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Artisan Tuning Crystal
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This Process Will Always Be The Same • Click The Cog Icon • Make The Level Range -5/+1 Current Level • Click The First Dropdown And Select Condition • Click The Fifth Dropdown And Select Fine • Sort By Price And Buy +What Is Cheapest +What Is Closest In Level • Click Through Each Category And Repeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Major Rune of Scavenging • (2) Major Rune of the Necromancer • (2) Major Sigil of Blood • (2) Major Sigil of Fire

[- HUMAN STORY MODE CATCH-UP -] To make up for either missed experience or lack of expereince boosts, we will not take a quick detour to catch up & even get ahead a bit on some story mode fun.
Try and do the full level 10 (Chapter 1) story chapter. This will ensure you stay ahead in experience.
[- WHY NO TRAIL? -] There are approximately 30 different initial storylines determined by the combination of your character's race and the three biography choices made during character creation. So, because of this, the first chapter of the story starts at the copied waypoint and you can follow it using the standard game interface.
[- OK! OK! THEN WHAT? -] Then, you can either return here and go left to the next waypoint step in the run, or go directly to Podaga Steading Waypoint.
poi.copy: Go To [&BO8AAAA=] To Start The Human Story!

poi.info:
[- NORN STORY MODE CATCH-UP -] To make up for either missed experience or lack of expereince boosts, we will not take a quick detour to catch up & even get ahead a bit on some story mode fun.
Try and do the full level 10 (Chapter 1) story chapter. This will ensure you stay ahead in experience.
The norn story starts in the town your are in. Just run to the green star in Hoelbrak!
[- WHY NO TRAIL? -] There are approximately 30 different initial storylines determined by the combination of your character's race and the three biography choices made during character creation. So, because of this, the first chapter of the story starts at the copied waypoint and you can follow it using the standard game interface.
[- OK! OK! THEN WHAT? -] Then, you can either return here and go left to the next waypoint step in the run, or go directly to Podaga Steading Waypoint.

[- ASURA STORY MODE CATCH-UP -] To make up for either missed experience or lack of expereince boosts, we will not take a quick detour to catch up & even get ahead a bit on some story mode fun.
Try and do the full level 10 (Chapter 1) story chapter. This will ensure you stay ahead in experience.
[- WHY NO TRAIL? -] There are approximately 30 different initial storylines determined by the combination of your character's race and the three biography choices made during character creation. So, because of this, the first chapter of the story starts at the copied waypoint and you can follow it using the standard game interface.
[- OK! OK! THEN WHAT? -] Then, you can either return here and go left to the next waypoint step in the run, or go directly to Podaga Steading Waypoint.
poi.copy: Go To [&BPcEAAA=] To Start The Asura Story!

So, because of this, the first chapter of the story starts at the copied waypoint and you can follow it using the standard game interface.
[- OK! OK! THEN WHAT? -] Then, you can either return here and go left to the next waypoint step in the run, or go directly to Podaga Steading Waypoint.

Try and do the full level 10 (Chapter 1) story chapter. This will ensure you stay ahead in experience.
[- WHY NO TRAIL? -] There are approximately 30 different initial storylines determined by the combination of your character's race and the three biography choices made during character creation. So, because of this, the first chapter of the story starts at the copied waypoint and you can follow it using the standard game interface.
[- OK! OK! THEN WHAT? -] Then, you can either return here and go left to the next waypoint step in the run, or go directly to Podaga Steading Waypoint.
